user_query: I'm organizing a basketball-themed party and I want to create a trivia game. Can you provide me with the full names and abbreviations of all the NBA teams participating in the current season? Additionally, fetch me the details of a random NBA player. Also, calculate the love percentage between John and Alice using the Love Calculator API.

TaskList.description: Fetch the full names and abbreviations of all NBA teams participating in the current season.
Fetch details of a random NBA player.
Calculate the love percentage between John and Alice using the Love Calculator API.
